name: inference-testing
description: Model-level inference testing for a research GPU platform: build eval suites and regression gates, benchmark serving performance (TTFT, tokens/sec, p95/p99), run release-gate audits (explainability, fairness, adversarial robustness), design shadow/canary/blue-green/A-B/bandit rollouts, stand up the 4-monitor drift stack, and red-team models before and after release. Translates SageMaker-era patterns to OSS on Lambda managed Kubernetes (Evidently, Prometheus, KServe-class serving).
